title: 🔄 Inverse Ritual Fields
name: Inverse Ritual Fields
what_it_is: Areas where rituals operate in reverse—where unmaking, forgetting, or *unspeaking* becomes the sacred act.
how_to_use: she walks backward through the ritual path—each step unwrites the prayer
his offering was silence—the god answered with void
animation_behavior: Symbols collapse inward, sound reverses, offerings unburn, light flows backward into the wick ---
